{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231532054425EBF9EE6D0B81B1D2"}"},"total":61643},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7175822447655174947","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书终于养到完结了，撒花！剧情非常有趣，作者脑洞很大，这是第一本让我开始不害怕这类惊悚片并沉浸其中的文。环环相扣，很有意思。不太喜欢的点是这个谜团的答案比想象中的简单，稍微有点头重脚轻的感觉，但是整体非常好看，并不影响。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1670751430,"group_id":"6995119379645991944","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"书架和书单推荐好看的书","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1Ir2ZJlTF8HBmcsquhBDFVWKo1GuuHkK+/U0Tuo2Ndt","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4d9b19c0e17e439fa8765244242da8eb~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792700&x-signature=JaPU4jKNmMmYbO2aL6O5Vl%2FtH%2Fw%3D","user_id":"1582891098704616","user_name":"姒婳^"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1582891098704616","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6995119379645991944","book_info":{"abstract":"一股神秘力量降落地球，诞生了另一个惊悚文明世界。
每个人十八岁都会被强制送入惊悚游戏世界。
当所有人沉浸在恐惧之中，夹缝中求生时。
秦诺却发现自己能通过左右鬼的情绪，获得系统奖励，并且每完成一次副本，就能在惊悚世界建立自己产业。
于是，
阴泉餐厅当传菜员、
死亡医院当主治医生、
冥间酒店当服务员、
恐怖高校当教课老师……
当秦诺疯狂去完成一个个副本时，最后突然发现，自己竟成了鬼界巨擘。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/90b4bbb06c3afd5dff23adb3e1da9992","author":"予作","author_id":"","book_id":"6995119379645991944","book_name":"我把惊悚世界玩成养成游戏！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282838","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"17.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":537,"name":"惊悚游戏","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=537&name=惊悚游戏&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6995533636791599652","read_count":"177723","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2317194"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.6","serial_count":"936","tags":"悬疑脑洞,灵异,架空,惊悚游戏,悬疑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/ce3427e7e60a64e263354d259c15f969~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779435125&x-signature=g3%2BDpqH8bFgr7KjdaFmNmg1uifU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"97842665754","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"8.0133708e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231532054425EBF9EE6D0B81B1D2"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读75小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":82,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":190594,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":270727,"reply_count":9,"show_pv":163461},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7049731866786267904","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"逻辑自洽性不错，文章结构精彩，内容丰富。
内容虽然是奇幻且具有恐怖色彩的，但是也反映了社会的一部分暗面，揭露了人性真实的暗面，有着其独特的社会价值。
情节复杂但结构紧凑，动人心弦。参入了反转，一波三折，揭露答案时令人拍案叫绝。
人物形象丰满，多面。不是简单的善恶，而是有人性的，真实的。性格的形成背景也烘托的很到位。
从环境而言，恐怖氛围的也营造不错。
总之，作者快更新吧!"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1641393615,"group_id":"6995119379645991944","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8NqOExKG/rg65oFzlzJ1O0EdwxD32IHSl5hvCNizFFj","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787248&x-signature=NtetCP%2BD2YPkYr6bl%2BJMa04hBGU%3D","user_id":"3501309781607223","user_name":"爱吃核桃饺子的赛巴斯"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3501309781607223","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1708199270,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6995119379645991944","book_info":{"abstract":"一股神秘力量降落地球，诞生了另一个惊悚文明世界。
